Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Dragon Icon]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Northstrider can manifest the authority of the Dragon Icon.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 11''' — The Dragon Icon resonates with the Strength Icon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 11''' — The Dragon Icon appeared behind the technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 11''' — The authority of the Dragon Icon was added onto a Path of black dragon-fire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 12''' — The Dragon Icon provides stolen authority that rages through Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 13''' — Lindon glared at Reigan Shen with the intensity of the Void and Dragon Icons combined.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 15''' — The Dragon Icon sings a song inside Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 17''' — The Dragon Icon is an icon that carries authority from Northstrider.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 17''' — The Dragon Icon displays a realistic image of a long, serpentine black dragon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 17''' — The Dragon Icon has no authority over healing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — Orthos shot dragon’s breath with a touch of the Dragon Icon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — The Dragon Icon provides Lindon with strength that defies the rules of the world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 21''' — The Dragon Icon did not form because Lindon reaffirmed his authority over the space.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 26''' — The strength of the Dragon Icon can help Mercy.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 4''' — The Dragon Icon has a song that grows louder as Northstrider taps into his dragon-based confidence.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 4''' — The Strength Icon and Dragon Icon were bound to the same purpose.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
